title: Life at the edge of where you'd think
summary: How the extremophile cast members (Crenarch / Acido / Cryo / Baro) live calmly in conditions a human body would find difficult — hot springs, deep-sea vents, sea ice, deep-sea pressure. Trauma-informed register per ADR-016: wonder + adaptation pride framing, NEVER scary / dangerous / hostile lexicon. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase4Kits().
